perturbation.original_text: WHEREAS, Ameren Illinois is in possession of certain proprietary and confidential data and information relating to municipal customer service and account data; WHEREAS, Ameren Illinois has agreed to the disclosure of such data and information to Recipient; and WHEREAS, Ameren Illinois desires to have all such information handled by Recipient on a confidential basis.
perturbation.changed_text: WHEREAS, Ameren Illinois is in possession of certain proprietary and confidential data and information relating to municipal customer service and account data; WHEREAS, Ameren Illinois has agreed to the disclosure of such data and information to Recipient, under the condition that it is made publicly available within 30 days; and WHEREAS, Ameren Illinois desires to have all such information handled by Recipient on a confidential basis.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction regarding the handling of confidential information. The original text states the information should be handled confidentially, while the modified text adds a condition that it should be made publicly available within 30 days. This in-text contradiction directly conflicts with the purpose of a non-disclosure agreement, where section 4 states: The Recipient shall maintain the confidentiality of any Confidential I nformation and shall not disclose such Confidential Information, in whole or in part, to any person other than its Representatives.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Non-Disclosure Obligation. The Recipient shall maintain the confidentiality of any Confidential I nformation and shall not disclose such Confidential Information, in whole or in part, to any person other than its Representatives who need to know such Confidential Information. Representatives shall be informed by the Recipient of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information and shall be directed by the Recipient to treat the Confidential Information confidentially, except with the prior written consent of Ameren Illinois or as otherwise permitted hereunder. Each Recipient agrees to be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by its Representative.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text stated the information should be handled confidentially. The changed text modifies this by stating the information should be made publicly available within 30 days. This directly conflicts with section 4, which states the Recipient shall maintain the confidentiality of any Confidential Information and shall not disclose it. Therefore, the change creates a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 1. Receipt of Information. Ameren Illinois disclose to Recipient, customer information protected from public disclosure pursuant to 815 ILCS 505/2HH (“Confidential Information”) for use by the Recipient and its officers, directors, agents, employees and contractors (collectively, the “Representatives”), on a need-to-know basis for the purpose of facilitating electric supply aggregation pursuant to 20 ILCS 3855/1-92.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. Receipt of Information. Ameren Illinois will attempt to disclose to Recipient, customer information protected from public disclosure pursuant to 815 ILCS 505/2HH (“Confidential Information”) for use by the Recipient and its officers, directors, agents, employees and contractors (collectively, the “Representatives”), on a need-to-know basis for the purpose of facilitating electric supply aggregation pursuant to 20 ILCS 3855/1-92.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that Ameren Illinois *discloses* information, creating an obligation. Changing it to 'will attempt to disclose' introduces ambiguity. This contradicts Section 8, which says Ameren Illinois makes no warranties to the accuracy or completeness of the Confidential Information. This would mean that Ameren Illinois is not reliable to what it discloses.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8. No Further Obligations. Ameren Illinois makes no representations or warranties, express or implied, with respect to the Confidential Information, including but not limited to the accuracy or completeness of the Confidential Information disclosed hereunder. Further, the Parties agree that this Agreement does not obligate either of the Parties to enter into any further agreements or to proceed with any possible relationship or other joint venture or transaction.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that Ameren Illinois *discloses* customer information, establishing a clear obligation. The changed text modifies this to 'will attempt to disclose', which introduces ambiguity and weakens the obligation. This directly contradicts Section 8, which states that Ameren Illinois makes no warranties to the accuracy or completeness of the Confidential Information disclosed. If Ameren Illinois only *attempts* to disclose and makes no warranties about the accuracy of the information, it conflicts with the expectation that the information provided will be reliable, thus creating a contradiction as per the Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction definition.

perturbation.original_text: 2. Confidential Information Defined. The Parties acknowledge that any such information referred to in paragraph above shall be considered Confidential Information. Under this Agreement, all information disclosed by the Ameren Illinois whether provided in oral, written, visual, electronic or other form is presumed to be Confidential Information unless it falls within one of the exclusions of Section 3. Confidential Information includes non-public customer specific information. Confidential Information as used herein also includes information supplied by Ameren Illinois to Recipient prior to the execution of this Agreement, and such Confidential Information shall be considered in the same manner and be subject to the same treatment as the Confidential Information made available after the execution of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. Confidential Information Defined. The Parties acknowledge that any such information referred to in paragraph above *may* be considered Confidential Information. Under this Agreement, only information explicitly labeled as 'Confidential' by Ameren Illinois, whether provided in oral, written, visual, electronic or other form is presumed to be Confidential Information unless it falls within one of the exclusions of Section 3. Confidential Information only includes non-public customer specific information when explicitly marked so. Confidential Information as used herein only includes information supplied by Ameren Illinois to Recipient after the execution of this Agreement, and such Confidential Information shall be considered in the same manner and be subject to the same treatment as the Confidential Information made available after the execution of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition broadly considers information as Confidential Information, but the altered definition states that information is only considered confidential if labeled as such. Also, the Original text states that the Confidential Information includes information supplied by Ameren Illinois to Recipient prior to the execution of this Agreement. The changed texts states that the Confidential Information only includes information supplied by Ameren Illinois to Recipient after the execution of this Agreement. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding what qualifies as confidential and creates uncertainty that contradicts with the statement on section 4, where Representatives shall be informed by the Recipient of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information and shall be directed by the Recipient to treat the Confidential Information confidentially.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Non-Disclosure Obligation. The Recipient shall maintain the confidentiality of any Confidential I nformation and shall not disclose such Confidential Information, in whole or in part, to any person other than its Representatives who need to know such Confidential Information. Representatives shall be informed by the Recipient of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information and shall be directed by the Recipient to treat the Confidential Information confidentially, except with the prior written consent of Ameren Illinois or as otherwise permitted hereunder. Each Recipient agrees to be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by its Representative.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 2 significantly alters the definition of 'Confidential Information.' The original text presumes all information is confidential unless excluded, while the changed text requires explicit labeling. This directly contradicts Section 4, which mandates recipients to treat 'Confidential Information' confidentially. The change introduces ambiguity and uncertainty about which information falls under the non-disclosure obligation, creating a strong in-text contradiction because the definition changes from broad to narrow, impacting the enforceability of the non-disclosure obligation. Also, the Original text states that the Confidential Information includes information supplied by Ameren Illinois to Recipient prior to the execution of this Agreement while the changed texts states that the Confidential Information only includes information supplied by Ameren Illinois to Recipient after the execution of this Agreement. This creates an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 5. Compliance with Legal Process. In the event that the Recipient is legally requested or required (by oral questions, interrogatories, requests for information or documents, subpoena, civil investigative demand or similar process or; in the opinion of counsel for the Recipient , by federal or state securities or other statutes, regulations or laws) to disclose any Confidential Information, the Recipient shall promptly notify Ameren Illinois of such request or requirement prior to disclosure so that Ameren Illinois may seek an appropriate protective order and/or waive compliance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. Compliance with Legal Process. In the event that the Recipient is legally requested or required (by oral questions, interrogatories, requests for information or documents, subpoena, civil investigative demand or similar process or; in the opinion of counsel for the Recipient , by federal or state securities or other statutes, regulations or laws) to disclose any Confidential Information, the Recipient shall immediately disclose this Confidential Information, regardless of whether Ameren Illinois is notified or seeks a protective order.
perturbation.explanation: The original text requires the Recipient to notify Ameren Illinois before disclosing Confidential Information. The modified text compels immediate disclosure, creating a direct contradiction. This undermines the intent of the agreement and conflicts with Section 4, which requires written consent from Ameren Illinois before disclosure.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Non-Disclosure Obligation. The Recipient shall maintain the confidentiality of any Confidential I nformation and shall not disclose such Confidential Information, in whole or in part, to any person other than its Representatives who need to know such Confidential Information. Representatives shall be informed by the Recipient of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information and shall be directed by the Recipient to treat the Confidential Information confidentially, except with the prior written consent of Ameren Illinois or as otherwise permitted hereunder. Each Recipient agrees to be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by its Representative.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates that the Recipient notify Ameren Illinois before disclosing Confidential Information, allowing Ameren Illinois to seek a protective order. The changed text requires immediate disclosure regardless of notification or protective orders. This directly contradicts Section 4, which requires prior written consent from Ameren Illinois for any disclosure. The changed text thus introduces a clear and undeniable contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 6. Remedies for Breach. Ameren Illinois may seek recourse in the form of injunctive or other equitable relief to remedy or forestall any breach or threatened breach involving a violation of this agreement, including but not limited to the marketing of goods and services beyond authorized aggregation activities. Such remedy shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement but shall be in addition to all other rights and remedies available at law or in equity.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. Remedies for Breach. Ameren Illinois may seek recourse in the form of injunctive or other equitable relief to remedy or forestall any breach or threatened breach involving a violation of this agreement, but only if the Recipient demonstrably acted in bad faith. Such remedy shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement, superseding all other rights and remedies available at law or in equity.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that injunctive relief is *one of many* remedies available. The modified text limits this recourse to cases of 'bad faith' and makes it the *exclusive* remedy. This change contradicts the original intent of the Remedies for Breach section, where The remedy shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement but shall be in addition to all other rights and remedies available at law or in equity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6. Remedies for Breach. Ameren Illinois may seek recourse in the form of injunctive or other equitable relief to remedy or forestall any breach or threatened breach involving a violation of this agreement, but only if the Recipient demonstrably acted in bad faith. Such remedy shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement, superseding all other rights and remedies available at law or in equity.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself. The original section 6 states that 'Ameren Illinois may seek recourse in the form of injunctive or other equitable relief...Such remedy shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedy...but shall be in addition to all other rights and remedies available at law or in equity.' The changed text then states 'Such remedy shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement, superseding all other rights and remedies available at law or in equity.' which goes against itself and the original Remedies for Breach.

perturbation.original_text: 10. No Waiver; Amendment; Exclusive Agreement. No failure or delay by either of the Parties in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder. This Agreement shall not be modified, supplemented or amended except by a writing signed by both Parties hereto. This Agreement represents the exclusive agreement between the Parties in connection with the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: 10. No Waiver; Amendment; Exclusive Agreement. No failure or delay by either of the Parties in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder. This Agreement can be modified, supplemented or amended verbally, with mutual agreement. This Agreement represents the exclusive agreement between the Parties in connection with the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.explanation: This change allows for verbal modification of the agreement, which directly contradicts the original text's explicit requirement for written amendments. This undermines the enforceability of the contract and directly contradicts the initial term of the contract that the agreement shall not be modified, supplemented or amended except by a writing signed by both Parties hereto.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 10. No Waiver; Amendment; Exclusive Agreement. No failure or delay by either of the Parties in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder. This Agreement can be modified, supplemented or amended verbally, with mutual agreement. This Agreement represents the exclusive agreement between the Parties in connection with the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly allows for verbal modifications to the agreement, while the original text states that modifications must be in writing. This creates a direct contradiction within the agreement, undermining its enforceability as the changed text states that 'This Agreement can be modified, supplemented or amended verbally, with mutual agreement' contradicting the original text requirement for written amendments.
